sanctions.details: U.S. comprehensive sanctions on Iran's oil, banking, and shipping sectors
EU embargo on Iranian crude oil imports

embargoes.details: Re-imposed after JCPOA withdrawal; targets all Iranian oil exports

trade_restrictions: U.S. secondary sanctions on buyers of Iranian oil
IR.notes: Iran holds world's 4th-largest proven reserves. Sanctions severely limit export capacity.

sanctions.details: Sanctions on Russian oil sector, price cap of $60/bbl on seaborne Russian crude
EU ban on seaborne Russian crude oil imports (Dec 2022) and refined products (Feb 2023)

embargoes.details: $60/bbl price cap on Russian seaborne crude using Western services

trade_restrictions: G7 price cap on crude ($60/bbl) and refined products
RU.notes: OPEC+ member (not OPEC). World's 3rd-largest producer. Redirected exports to India and China since 2022.

sanctions.details: Sanctions on PDVSA (state oil company) and oil sector

trade_restrictions: Limited licenses issued for specific transactions
VE.notes: Holds world's largest proven reserves but production collapsed due to mismanagement and sanctions.

SA.notes: OPEC's de facto leader. Largest spare production capacity globally. Swing producer.

IQ.notes: OPEC member. 2nd-largest OPEC producer. Ongoing disputes over Kurdish autonomous region exports.

AE.notes: OPEC member. Lobbying for higher production quota. Major refining and trading hub (Fujairah).

KW.notes: OPEC founding member. Operates Neutral Zone jointly with Saudi Arabia.

LY.notes: OPEC member. Exempt from quotas due to civil conflict. Production highly volatile.

NG.notes: Africa's largest oil producer. Chronic underproduction vs quota due to theft, pipeline sabotage.

sanctions.details: U.S. sanctions on Syrian oil and energy sector
EU ban on Syrian oil imports

SY.notes: Minimal production. Oil fields largely under various faction control.

sanctions.details: UN Security Council cap on refined petroleum imports (500K bbl/year)

KP.notes: Negligible domestic production. Subject to strict UN petroleum import limits.
